command.description: The executable to launch the language server

args.description: Arguments to pass to the language server executable

extensionToLanguage.description: Mapping from file extension (e.g. '.go') to language identifier

transport.description: Communication transport between Claude Code and the LSP server

initializationOptions.description: Options passed to the LSP server during initialization

settings.description: LSP workspace/user settings sent after initialization

maxRestarts.description: Maximum number of times to restart the server on failure
